even the individuals who discard astrology as a pseudo then
only science will start appreciating the usefulness of this
subject. Let us try to reestablish that ancient glory of astrology,
by systematic study of this subject, and revealing the useful
information gained for the benefit of all. Let us be sincere in
our effort.

Birth Time Rectification
Example (Case Study)
Step 1 -BT by Chart Analysis
Date ofBirth: 21-02-1969
Place Of Birth: Labasa (Lambasa), Fiji (Fiji Time= +12
hours East of GMT) Long= 179. 23'East Lat = 16.25' South
Time of Birth: Not sure but mother says that it was in the
early hours of the Morning i.e. between 4.30am-6.30am.
(approximating)
I started with both the birth time choices and decided to
use ChandraHari Ayanamsa and 3652425 year length. (JHora
software).
